summary: Short-circuit `login` dry-run / verify-env before credential resolution.
reason: The verify harness probes `login --dry-run` in a sterile environment; the machine template resolves credentials first and errors 'client ID is required' before its verify short-circuit is reached. Carried forward from fix-auth-loopback-and-dry-run; machine-side gap tracked in mvanhorn/cli-printing-press (auth.go.tmpl short-circuit ordering).
validated_outcome: verify matrix scores login 3/3 (help, dry-run, execute) without credentials.
